description: A user is reporting intermittent issues with the API portal. Your task is to reproduce a specific sequence of network events and capture a forensic trace (HAR file) for the engineering team. Capture a single HAR file containing the network activity for: submitting a form at https://httpbin.org/forms/post, a slow response at https://httpbin.org/delay/3, and a server error at https://httpbin.org/status/503. Export the combined trace as 'incident_trace.har' to /home/ga/Desktop.
